homePage.title: Retro Arcade
homePage.subtitle: Shoot 'em up
description: is an open-source, classic arcade shooter.

sponsorDescr.title: Sponsor Julien Von Der Marck on GitHub Sponsors
sponsorDescr.descr: Passionate open-source dev. I maintain Dinosaur Exploder, a free Java/FXGL shoot ’em up. Welcoming & guiding new contributors every day! 🦖✨

footer: Dinosaur Exploder — made with love — Java/JavaFX/FXGL — open source

playPage.title: Play online
playPage.description: Try the browser version right here. It keeps the retro feel, keyboard controls, and score chase without making you install Java first.
playPage.note: Tip: click inside the game area first, then use the keyboard to fly and shoot.

goal.title: Goal
goal.descr: You control a spaceship in a retro arcade arena. Your objective is simple: survive waves of incoming dinosaurs and score as many points as you can.

gameplay.title: Gameplay loop
steps: Move your spaceship to dodge dinosaurs and hazards.
Shoot dinosaurs to earn points and clear the screen.
Use your shield to survive tight moments.
Use a bomb when the screen is crowded (it clears all dinosaurs).
gameplay.difficulty: The difficulty increases over time as more dinosaurs appear.

demo.title: Gameplay Demo
demo.error: Your browser does not support the video tag.
demo.description: Short gameplay demo showing movement, shooting, and enemy waves.

help.title: Want to help?
help.description: You can contribute to the game (Java/FXGL) or the website (Next.js). Check the GitHub issues and pick something small to start.

credits.title: Credits
credits.description: This project exists thanks to the community. Here are the GitHub contributors ❤️
credits.error: Couldn't load contributors right now (GitHub API limit or network). Please try again later.

addName.title: Add your name here
addName.description: Want to appear on this list? Make a PR (game or website), and GitHub will automatically include you.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: The fastest way to reach us is through the community channels below.

github.title: GitHub Discussions
github.description: Ask questions, propose ideas, and get help.

sponsor.title: Sponsor
sponsor.description: Support development if you like the project.

review.title: Leave a review
review.description: Tried the game or the website? Help the project grow with a quick note or a star.

star.title: Star the repo
star.description: A star is the fastest public thumbs-up.

discord.title: Discord feedback
discord.description: Drop quick reactions and suggestions in chat.

contribute.title: Contribute
contribute.description: Want to help? Pick an issue on GitHub, or contribute to the website in the /website folder.
